sentences.english: I hang out with my boyfriend.
We usually go out for dinner or maybe see a movie.
sentences.korean: 보통 저녁 먹으러 나가거나 영화를 봐요.

sentences.english: Sometimes we'll just stay in, watch TV, and have a relaxed evening at home.
sentences.korean: 가끔은 그냥 집에서 TV 보면서 편안한 저녁을 보내요.

sentences.english: We like to keep it simple and just enjoy each other's company.
sentences.korean: 가끔은 그냥 집에서 TV 보면서 편안한 저녁을 보내요

sentences.english: I usually hang out with my girlfriend.

quiz.question: What does '의미 있는 시간' mean in English?

sentences.english: We go to movies, get coffee, things like that.
sentences.korean: 영화 보고, 커피 마시고, 그런 것들이요.

sentences.english: We also like to explore the city — go to different neighborhoods, try new restaurants.
Sometimes we invite friends over and have dinner parties at our place.
I used to go out to bars with friends, but now that I'm married with a son, that's changed.
sentences.korean: 예전에는 친구들과 바에 나갔지만, 결혼하고 아들이 생기면서 바뀌었어요.

sentences.english: Now I mostly hang out with my family — my wife and my son.
We go to parks, play games, watch movies together.
sentences.korean: 공원에 가고, 게임하고, 같이 영화 봐요.

sentences.english: It's a different kind of fun, but I really enjoy it.
I like to spend time with my best friend, and we often hang out with our parents too.
sentences.korean: 친한 친구와 시간 보내는 걸 좋아하고, 부모님과도 자주 같이 놀아요.

sentences.english: We go shopping, have coffee, sometimes go to the cinema.
sentences.korean: 쇼핑하고, 커피 마시고, 가끔 영화관에 가요.

sentences.english: It's nice to have quality time with the people I care about.
sentences.korean: 쇼핑하고 커피 마시고 가끔 영화관에 가요

quiz.question: What does '~하는 경향이 있다' mean in English?

sentences.english: I don't know many people in my area, so I don't really go out much.
sentences.korean: 동네에 아는 사람이 많지 않아서 별로 밖에 안 나가요.

sentences.english: I watch movies, play video games, read books.
I'm quite content staying home and doing my own thing.

quiz.question: What does '어울려 다니다, 시간을 보내다' mean in English?
